form.formComment: Returns from a 38-day let-up. At the latest run won by 1.4 len at this track March 1 over 1400m defeating Greenlight Queen with 57.5kg at $8. The start before that second last of 10 at Greyville All Weather on February 6 over 1400m, 7 len behind Izibulo carrying 58kg at $13.50. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 250m, hung in and shifted in.
Proved difficult to settle in the early stages.
